Explorer.Name: LaunchTo
Explorer.Description: Changes where Explorer windows open to by default

Explorer.Name: StartupDelayInMSec
Explorer.Description: Disables the startup delay for applications

Explorer.Name: DisableEdgeDesktopShortcutCreation
Explorer.Description: Disables the creation of the Edge desktop shortcut

UserSwitching.Name: HideFastUserSwitching
UserSwitching.Description: Disables fast user switching options in the UI

Search.Name: SearchboxTaskbarMode
Search.Description: Sets the search button in the taskbar, a value of 0 will disable the search icon

Search.Name: ConnectedSearchUseWeb
Search.Description: Disables searching the web from search

Search.Name: DisableWebSearch
Search.Description: Disables searching the web from search

Taskbar.Name: HidePeopleBar
Taskbar.Description: Disables People features in the taskbar

Taskbar.Name: PeopleBand
Taskbar.Description: Disables People features in the taskbar

CloudContent.Name: DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures
CloudContent.Description: Disables consumer features (Pre-loaded games, like Candy Crush, etc.)

CloudContent.Name: DisableSoftLanding
CloudContent.Description: Disables Tips, Tricks, and Suggestions notifications

ContentDelivery.Name: SoftLandingEnabled
ContentDelivery.Description: Disables Tips, Tricks, and Suggestions notifications
